# minio_storage_info (Data Source)

Returns disk and drive status for all MinIO server nodes. Essential for capacity planning and health monitoring.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_storage_info" "current" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `available_space` (String) Available storage (bytes).
- `disk_count` (Number) Total number of disks.
- `disks` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--disks))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `offline_disks` (Number) Number of disks offline.
- `online_disks` (Number) Number of disks online.
- `total_space` (String) Total storage capacity (bytes).
- `used_space` (String) Used storage (bytes).

<a id="nestedatt--disks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `disks`

Read-Only:

- `available_space` (String)
- `endpoint` (String)
- `healing` (Boolean)
- `path` (String)
- `scanning` (Boolean)
- `state` (String)
- `total_space` (String)
- `used_space` (String)
